pageDescription: Schedule saved queries with a lookback window, recurrence, notifications and consolidated history.

feedback.downloadError: Failed to download the result CSV.

form.title: New schedule
form.description: Select the query, the lookback window and the run frequency.
form.pendingSetupDescription: Register at least one query and one authenticated client before creating a schedule.
form.noRecipientsDescription: Notifications are enabled, but no email has been registered in the settings screen.

fields.queryHelperText: Queries linked to clients fill the selection automatically.
fields.notifyByEmail: Notify by email when there are results

activeList.title: Active schedules
activeList.description: View the recurrence, linked clients and open the history for each item.
activeList.emptyDescription: Create the first schedule to track automatic runs on this screen.

history.title: History and results
history.subtitle: Runs of the {{name}} schedule
history.selectPrompt: Select a schedule to track its recorded runs.
history.noneSelectedDescription: Use the History button in the list above to open the results for a specific schedule.
history.emptyDescription: Results will appear here as soon as the schedule generates persisted runs.
history.searchPlaceholder: Filter by environment or Search ID…
history.noMatchTitle: No runs for the current filter
history.noMatchDescription: Adjust the status or search term to see other runs.

deleteDialog.title: Remove schedule
deleteDialog.confirmSuffix: ? The stored run history will remain available only as long as results are retained.

previewModal.title: Run details
previewModal.noResultPersisted: No result persisted for this run.

queries.pageDescription: Build reusable SQL queries, with suggested clients, to speed up investigations and feed schedules.

createCard.title: New query
createCard.description: Save ready-made queries for reuse in recurring searches, playbooks and schedules.

catalogCard.title: Query catalog
catalogCard.description: Edit, review and keep queries curated for the whole operation.

deleteDialog.title: Remove query
deleteDialog.confirmSuffix: ? It will no longer appear for searches and new schedules.

detections.pageDescription: Triage first-class detections generated by scheduled queries, live queries and correlation rules.
